info.title: Unlimitedinf.Tom
info.description: Various tools and utilities that I've needed or found useful.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

commands.name: chart-system-stats
commands.description: Given an input of system stat file(s), generate png charts for them.

options.name: --script
options.description: Instead of generating charts, display the script that should be installed to generate the data files. [default: False]

options.name: --merge
options.description: Instead of generating charts, merge any single line files into a single file. [default: False]

arguments.name: data-dir
arguments.description: The directory containing one or many files of data to use for generating the charts.

commands.name: hash
commands.description: Hashes files based on the chosen hash algorithm.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Do not display any extra information beyond the file hashes. [default: False]

arguments.name: algorithm
arguments.description: The type of hash algorithm to use. [default: MD5]

arguments.name: paths
arguments.description: The directory path(s) to hash. The default is Environment.CurrentDirectory. [default: System.IO.DirectoryInfo[]]

commands.name: hash-rename
commands.description: Hashes files based on the chosen hash algorithm, and then renames the files to their hash.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Do not display any extra information beyond the file hashes. [default: False]

arguments.name: algorithm
arguments.description: The type of hash algorithm to use. [default: MD5]

arguments.name: paths
arguments.description: The directory path(s) to hash. The default is Environment.CurrentDirectory. [default: System.IO.DirectoryInfo[]]

commands.name: identicon
commands.description: Generates a deterministic geometric identicon image from a string seed.

options.name: --size
options.description: Output image size in pixels (square). [default: 64]

options.name: --blocks
options.description: Number of cells along each side of the grid. [default: 4]

options.name: --grayscale
options.description: Use only the red channel value for all three channels. [default: False]

arguments.name: seed
arguments.description: The input string (e.g. an email address) to generate the identicon from.

arguments.name: output
arguments.description: The output file path. Extension determines format: .svg or .png.

commands.name: img-dimension
commands.description:
Uses image dimensions to filter low-quality images into a separate folder.
Filtered images will be placed in a 'toss' directory in the directy of the item(s) to inspect.
If width and height are requested, then megapixels is ignored. Otherwise each filter will apply individually.

options.name: --width
options.description: The width of the image. [default: 0]

options.name: --height
options.description: The height of the image. [default: 0]

options.name: --megapixels
options.description: The area of the image. Default of 0.5mp is equivalent to an approx 700x700 square image. [default: 0.5]

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Do not display any extra information beyond the file hashes. [default: False]

arguments.name: paths
arguments.description: The directory path(s) to hash. The default is Environment.CurrentDirectory. [default: System.IO.DirectoryInfo[]]

commands.name: blockhash
commands.description: Uses blockhash to compute the hamming distance between image files.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Do not display any extra information beyond the file hashes. [default: False]

arguments.name: confidence
arguments.description: The confidence interval for blockhash similarity computed by hamming distance. [default: 25]

arguments.name: paths
arguments.description: The directory path(s) to hash. The default is Environment.CurrentDirectory. [default: System.IO.DirectoryInfo[]]

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: The type of random to get. Pick from the supported values.

commands.name: wsc
commands.description: Establish a web socket client connection to another instance of 'tom wss' for p2p communication.

options.name: --working-dir
options.description: The working directory to be used for serving files. Only files that are a children of this directory can be copied. [default: <path>]

options.name: --ssl-cert-subject
options.description: Used in scenarios where the HTTPS certificate is a valid and trusted SSL certificate but the remote name used to reach the destination won't match the presented certificate.

options.name: --ssl-cert-thumbprint
options.description: Used in scenarios where the HTTPS certificate is a self-signed certificate and the only validation possible is by thumbprint.

options.name: --max-session-duration
options.description: After this amount of time, the session will be aborted with the server. [default: 3.00:00:00]

arguments.name: endpoint
arguments.description: The hostname and port to establish the websocket connection to. E.g wss://localhost:45678

commands.name: wss
commands.description: Creates a web socket server to be used for p2p communication.

options.name: --working-dir
options.description: The working directory to be used for serving files. Only files that are a children of this directory can be copied. [default: <path>]

options.name: --mbps
options.description: Rate-limit the sending and receiving of files to this megabits per second. [default: 0]

options.name: --host
options.description: The hostname to run on. By default accepts any hostname. [default: +]

options.name: --port
options.description: The port to listen on for connections. [default: 51116]

options.name: --https-pfx-path
options.description: If provided, will use this certificate for HTTPS instead of the built-in ASP.NET Core certificate.

options.name: --https-crtpem-path
options.description: If provided, will use this certificate for HTTPS instead of the built-in ASP.NET Core certificate. Needs to be paired with --https-keypem-path to work.

options.name: --https-keypem-path
options.description: If provided, will use this certificate for HTTPS instead of the built-in ASP.NET Core certificate. Needs to be paired with --https-crtpem-path to work.

options.name: --https-generate-cert
options.description: If provided, will generate an https certificate with a nonsense subject name to be used for manual validation. [default: False]

commands.name: zz-test-chart-line
commands.description: Test generating a ScottPlot line chart and saving it as an image headlessly.

commands.name: zz-test-console-colors
commands.description: Test the output of the ConsoleColor enum to see what the terminal supports.

options.name: --background-color
options.description: The background color to display against. [default: -1]

commands.name: zz-test-console-progress
commands.description: Test the ConsoleFileProgressLogger to validate functionality.

commands.name: zz-test-console-write-table
commands.description: Test the ConsoleFileProgressLogger to validate functionality.
